zh.lifeSummary: 當John Clinton Baron of Clinton於1434年出生在英國英格蘭肯特福爾可斯同時，他的父親John Clinton24歲，母親Joan de Ferrers24歲。他於1470年與Elizabeth Fiennes在英國素可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1488年2月29日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Clinton Baron of Clinton于1434年出生在英国英格兰肯特福爾可斯同时，他的父亲John Clinton24岁，母亲Joan de Ferrers24岁。他于1470年与Elizabeth Fiennes在英国素可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1488年2月29日在英国英格兰倫敦享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Clinton Baron of Clinton was born in 1434, in Folkestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Clinton, was 24 and his mother, Joan de Ferrers, was 24. He married Elizabeth Fiennes in 1470, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 29 February 1488, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Clinton Baron of Clinton est né en 1434, à Folkestone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Clinton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan de Ferrers, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Fiennes en 1470, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 29 février 1488, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Clinton Baron of Clinton 1434 in Folkestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Clinton 24 und seine Mutter Joan de Ferrers 24. Er hat 1470 in Sussex, England Elizabeth Fiennes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 29. Februar 1488 im Alter von 54 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Clinton Baron of Clinton è nato il nel 1434 nel Folkestone, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Clinton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Ferrers, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Fiennes nel 1470, nel Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 29 febbraio 1488, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Clinton Baron of Clintonが1434年にイギリスイギリスケントフォルケストーンで生まれた時，父John Clintonは24歳，母Joan de Ferrersは24歳であった。1470年にイギリススセックスでElizabeth Fiennesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1488年2月29日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Clinton Baron of Clinton(이)가 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 폴케스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Clinton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Ferrers(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1470년 영국 수세스에서 Elizabeth Fiennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1488년 2월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Clinton Baron of Clinton nasceu em 1434, em Folkestone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Clinton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Ferrers, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Fiennes em 1470, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 29 de fevereiro de 1488, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Clinton Baron of Clinton родился в 1434 г. в местности фолкестоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Clinton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Ferrers, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Fiennes в 1470 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 29 февраля 1488 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Clinton Baron of Clinton nació en 1434, en Folkestone, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Clinton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan de Ferrers, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Fiennes en 1470, en Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 29 de febrero de 1488, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
